title: aSPARK-policy pack's own policy.yaml fragment
description: The bare rules-only policy.yaml a pack ships alongside its pack.yaml, per FORMAT-REFERENCE.md §2.1. Distinct from a project/org-level policy.yaml (see project-policy.schema.json) — carries no schema_version, name, extends or imports.

ruleBlock.description: A rule domain block. Structurally an open mapping; `final`, `id`, `severity`, `scope` and `check` carry a fixed meaning (FORMAT-REFERENCE.md §1.1). No domain-specific sub-key is validated (§6).
